runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP Targeted Check - post-main-push production state
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production alias https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app resolves to deployment dpl_FL6sxSAvt1apQNm8FGwMRibZsgxL in READY state

/api/version returned v8.11.124, commit cf5480e855ff2476c928b7ff7f4399c664ff70ea, release tag v8.11.124, and GitLab pipeline 2513741959; this confirms post-push commit c933dc7eb is not yet deployed to Vercel production
/api/health returned success=true with database, cache, and ai services connected
Landing page rendered OpenManager AI production shell with v8.11.124, Next.js 16 + React 19, and system start CTA
System start CTA navigated through /system-boot to /dashboard
Dashboard rendered 18 total servers, 17 online, 1 warning, 0 risk, 0 offline, OpenTelemetry snapshot 18:00 KST slot 108/143, and resource warning Top 5
AI assistant sidebar opened from dashboard with AI engine status Ready
AI prompt '지난 24시간 중 가장 부하가 높았던 시간대는 언제야?' returned a visible response: '17:00-18:00'
The same AI peak-load response used the generic conversation evidence path, not a deterministic metric/tool-grounded path
AI-related network requests returned HTTP 200/201 for /api/ai/wake-up, /api/health?service=ai, /api/ai/jobs, and /api/ai/jobs/:id/stream was visible in Performance API as EventSource/other
skippedSurfaces: This was not a release-gate run because Vercel production still points at v8.11.124 / cf5480e8, not pushed commit c933dc7eb
Full five-question conversational AI QA was not repeated to avoid unnecessary live LLM cost on an unchanged production deployment
OAuth callback, modal detail pack, Reporter Agent, Analyst Agent, mobile viewport, and Cloud Run admin monitoring endpoints were not exercised in this targeted check
Browser console message export was skipped because the active Playwright MCP surface in this session did not expose console collection; network and screenshot evidence were captured instead

aiLatencyObservations.source: Playwright MCP Performance API resource timing

plannerShadowObservations.source: visible assistant metadata showed '일반 대화 응답'

expertAssessments.rationale: Production is healthy and READY; serving v8.11.124 / cf5480e8 is expected for this non-deploying main push because production deploys only through semver tag pipelines.
The 24-hour peak-load question no longer reproduced an empty response in this sample, but it remained generic and did not expose deterministic metric evidence or top-server context.
expertAssessments.nextAction: After the domain-evidence fix is released, rerun the peak-load question and require a metric-grounded response with time slot, load value, and top servers.

expertAssessments.rationale: This was correctly scoped as a non-counting targeted production check on an unchanged deployment, with durable screenshot/network evidence and Vercel usage verification.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after targeted production check; effective 6.7213 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 6090.

artifacts.label: Production AI result and Performance API resource timing

pendingImprovements.title: Production AI Assistant 24시간 피크 부하 질의가 deterministic metric evidence 없이 generic 응답으로 처리됨
pendingImprovements.note: This run returned a visible one-line answer instead of an empty body, but metadata still showed 일반 대화 응답 and lacked load value/top-server grounding. Keep open until the domain-evidence fix is deployed and retested.

notes: This run intentionally does not count toward summary because it rechecked the existing v8.11.124 production deployment after a non-deploying main push.
Vercel Git Integration is disabled; GitLab main validation succeeded for c933dc7eb, but production deploy requires semver tag CI.
mode audit: 24h peak-load query resolved through /api/ai/jobs with visible metadata '일반 대화 응답', so route/data grounding drift remains on current production.

links.label: Post-push validate pipeline for undeployed commit c933dc7eb
